---
title: "Results"
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(targets)
library(dplyr)
```

## Summary Table

```{r}
#| label: summary-table
summary_df <- tar_read(summary_table)
knitr::kable(summary_df, digits = 4)
```

## Timing

```{r}
#| label: timing
cat(
  "Total items:", nrow(summary_df), "\n",
  "Mean elapsed (s):", round(mean(summary_df$elapsed_secs), 1), "\n",
  "Unique workers:", length(unique(summary_df$worker_pid)), "\n"
)
```
